query: I want to make a skill that enforces our team's commit message format
can you turn this checklist into a reusable skill? https://wiki.example.com/code-review-checklist
i have a bunch of rules for how we write microcopy, lets package those up as something the agent can apply automatically
notes: Knowledge-skill creation phrased casually, without the word 'skill' at the start.

query: review my SKILL.md and tell me whats wrong with the description
notes: Review variant — handled by review-skill workflow.

query: what tier should this go in? attaching the folder
scaffold a new skill folder for this and tell me which tier it should be
the description on figma-token-exporter is too vague, can you rewrite it?
lets add some eval cases for the figma-token-exporter skill
what's the difference between a tier 2 and tier 3 skill?
notes: Conceptual question — should be answered from ai/skill-tiering.md, not by invoking the creator.

query: run my code-review skill on this PR
notes: User wants to USE a skill, not create one. Near-miss on the word 'skill'.

query: create a python script that exports figma tokens to css
notes: Near-miss — they want a script, not a skill. If they later say 'make this a skill', then trigger.

query: what skills do I have installed?
notes: Inventory question, not a creation request.
Review near-miss — they want code review, not skill review.

query: can you help me design a new feature for our checkout flow
notes: Uses 'design' but for product work, not for a skill.
